handoff_notes: Retrospective worker-result artifact added so historical completed AFK tasks have durable structured evidence.
risks: This is retrospective bootstrap evidence for tasks completed before the worker-result contract existed; it records durable file/test evidence but not original raw worker transcripts.
summary: Historical Goal Contract, Story Loop, and Stage 1 planning AFK tasks have durable structured result evidence.

tests_run.summary: Passed as the repo-wide verification gate for the historical implementation surface.
